# Getting started with the platform

This guide walks customers through initial setup and inviting their first user.

## Creating your account

When a user first signs up, they create a workspace. The workspace is where all their projects live. Each customer can invite additional users to their workspace.

Customers are billed monthly. Users within a customer's workspace are not billed individually — only the account owner (who is also a user) is billed. If a customer upgrades, their users will get access to the new features automatically.

## Configuring your workspace

You can customize your workspace settings from the Settings page. Users will be able to see changes after refreshing. Your workspace name is shown in the top navigation bar. If you rename it, their view will update after they log out and back in.

## Connecting to Github

To connect your repository, navigate to Integrations and select GitHub. Click Authorize to grant access to your GitHub account. Once connected, your Github repositories will appear in the project selector.

Make sure you have admin access on GitHub before attempting to connect. If you see an error from Github, check your permissions.

## Inviting team members

Once your workspace is set up, you can invite colleagues. Invitations are sent by email. Teammates who accept the invite will appear in your member list as collaborators.
